3095210.name: My Recycling Center - Car Scrapyard Expansion
3095210.description:
Join the scrapping business and part-out the cars environmentally friendly. Use the hydraulic hoist to lift the car. Take out the battery, catalytic converter, rims and tires. Then use the material handler excavator and throw the body into the crusher.

  • Numerous realistic junk cars with detachable parts
  • New tools: Impact wrench and angle grinder
  • Material handler excavator with electro magnet to move the cars
  • 2 authentic animated car crushers
  • Dynamic real-time destruction of the cars in the crusher
  • Hydraulic hoist
  • New scrapyard area behind the recycling center with detailed scrap cars, parts and more
  • Laptop for scrapyard management
  • New trash types: Batteries, catalytic converters, car parts
  • Owners of DLC "Container Truck Expansion" can take the new trash types to the waste processing plant
3095210.supported_languages:
英语*, 德语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
